FFS Q33 How likely are you to tell your doctor when you disagree with him or her? 
In the last 6 months, how often did you leave your doctor’s office feeling that all of your concerns or questions were 
md_leavansr FFS Q34 fully answered? 
In the last 6 months, how often did you make sure you understood the results of any medical test or procedure such as 
md_result FFS Q35 x-ray, blood test, or EKG for heart conditions?
